daily.today_energy: your intuition is hitting different today—trust those gut feelings that pop up randomly. the universe is basically screaming to pay attention to what your body and soul are telling you right now.
daily.love: someone's noticing your energy in ways that matter. whether you're coupled up or flying solo, today's about recognizing your own worth first. vulnerability looks good on you, honestly.
daily.career: your creative ideas have serious potential energy today. don't sleep on that random thought you had—jot it down and sit with it. momentum builds when you actually show up for your vision.
daily.health: your nervous system might be a lil overstimulated, so carve out some quiet time to reset. moving your body gently or just existing peacefully will help you feel more grounded and present.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is running hot this week, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings about people and situations—they're picking up on something real. This is your moment to act on creative ideas you've been sitting on.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing you more than usual, and honestly? Let yourself be seen. Whether single or coupled, vulnerability is your superpower right now. Real connections happen when you drop the filter.
weekly.career: That project or idea you thought was dead? It's getting fresh energy. Your unique perspective is exactly what's needed right now. Speak up in meetings—your voice matters more than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Honor rest when it calls, and move in ways that feel good rather than obligatory. Creativity and play are healing for your soul right now.
